title: NetherUpdate Netherite
description: this mod adds the Netherite in 1.7.10, 1.12.2 and 1.14.4
body:
[![Kinetic hosting code frost15](https://i.imgur.com/KjxYj3F.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=189)

# About

Welcome to NetherUpdate Backport mod, this mod adds the additions of 1.16 to 1.7.10; 1.12.2 and 1.14
Enjoy!

## Localization:

Translations may be unfinished or out of date:
- en_us 
- fr_fr 

## First is the blocks/materials

Ancient Debris (It can be found all through the nether but requires diamond tools to mine)

Netherite Scrap (You get this from mining Ancient Debris)

Netherite Ingot (If you mix 4 Netherite Scrap and 4 gold in the crafting table, you get this)

## The Weapons/Tools

Netherite Sword

Netherite Pickaxe

Netherite Axe

Netherite Shovel

Netherite Hoe

Netherite Hammer (1.7.10 only)

(The tools are not fire/lava proof)

## The Armor

Netherite Helmet

Netherite Chestplate

Netherite Leggings

Netherite Boots


 

 

You can use this mod in your modpack
